tipRules.tip: Johnston: When bed fishing, drop shot a finesse worm alongside flipping presentations. Use Garmin Perspective Mode and a Power-Pole Move trolling motor to see and target bed fish.
Johnston: Flip various worms and creature baits to bed fish. When the bed fish pattern starts dwindling, switch to flipping spatterdock (pads) on the main river for big bites — this produced a 7-12.

knowledge.insight: Johnston: When a main pattern starts dwindling, have a backup plan ready. At St. Johns, flipping pads on the main river when the bed fish pattern faded was probably the best decision I could have made — it produced my biggest fish.
Johnston: Garmin Perspective Mode is critical for bed fishing in low-visibility conditions. Relied heavily on it along with the Power-Pole Move trolling motor for targeting bed fish.
